commands.repair_reason: Protected maintainer/human-review state plus the explicit stop command leave this for maintainer validation; I found no narrow automated repair defect to queue.; Cleared: Cleared: the diff adds fake-key regression tests and test-runner routing only, with no dependency, workflow, package, credential, or runtime secret-handling change. commands.review_summary:
Adds an unmocked image-tool regression test for config-backed custom provider auth and updates the test-project router to recognize split agents Vitest config targets.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a current-main bug reproduction: the runtime bug was already addressed by https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/85570, and this branch adds regression coverage rather than changing behavior.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer/human-review state plus the explicit stop command leave this for maintainer validation; I found no narrow automated repair defect to queue.

commands.author: hxy91819

target.title: test(tools): add unmocked image custom-provider auth regression
target.body:
## Summary

- Add `image-tool.custom-provider-auth.proof.test.ts` to cover the user-reported custom-provider image auth bug with **unmocked** `model-auth` and helper wiring.
- Exercises config-only `models.providers.<id>.apiKey` auth through `hasProviderAuthForTool`, `resolveImageModelConfigForTool`, production image-tool factory availability, and deferred `execute` with real `getApiKeyForModel`.
- Includes negative coverage when `apiKey` is missing, plus a regression note for the pre-fix `hasAuthForProvider`-only candidate filter.

Follow-up to #85570. Existing `image-tool.test.ts` coverage mocks `model-auth`, so it cannot prove the shipped auth resolution path end-to-end.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/image-tool.custom-provider-auth.proof.test.ts`

Behavior addressed: custom provider vision models configured only via `models.providers.<id>.apiKey` should auto-discover and execute on the deferred image tool path without env keys or auth profiles.
Real environment tested: Linux source checkout on latest `main` with Node 22.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/image-tool.custom-provider-auth.proof.test.ts`
Evidence after fix: 6/6 tests passed in the new proof file (Vitest run on branch head).
Observed result after fix: config-backed custom provider auth resolves image model config, registers the tool, resolves runtime API key from config, and executes without "No image model is configured".
What was not tested: live gateway/channel roundtrip, e2e-go smoke, or changes outside the new regression test file.
target.author: hxy91819
